description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in a casual, layered outfit consisting of a plaid button-up shirt over a striped t-shirt, paired with fitted pants that have a subtle pattern. The figure's facial features are neutral, and his hair is cut short and neatly styled. His footwear appears to be simple, close-fitting shoes suitable for everyday urban environments. The overall appearance suggests a relaxed, everyday pedestrian commonly seen in city streets or neighborhoods.
description: A stocky adult male in casual layered clothing, including a plaid shirt, striped t-shirt, patterned pants, and simple shoes, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, layered shirts, and both arms extended horizontally.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the roundness of the torso, and the arm's extension.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plaid shirt's pattern, the back of the head, and both arms extended.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the body contour, and the arm's extension.
attribute_clothing_type: casual button-up shirt over a t-shirt with fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
